description_long: This sculpture depicts a stylized human head with flowing, textured hair and delicate facial features. The face is partially hollowed out, with a large opening on one side, giving it a fragmented and weathered appearance. The hair is rendered in thick, wavy locks that cascade down the sides and back of the head, with some strands resting on the base. The surface is mottled with earthy tones, suggesting aged stone or bronze with patina. The base is a simple rectangular plinth that supports the head. The overall impression is one of classical beauty combined with a sense of ruin or incompleteness.
description: A weathered, fragmented human head sculpture with flowing hair and a hollowed face, rendered in earthy tones and mounted on a rectangular base.
description_view_0: Front-left view showing the hollowed face, detailed hair, and the dramatic opening on the left side.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the rounded back of the head and the textured, wavy hair with no facial features visible.
description_view_2: Back-right view emphasizing the smooth curvature of the head and the continuation of the hair, with the hollowed face partially visible.
description_view_3: Right profile view displaying the intact side of the face, the nose, lips, and the hand-like form at the base, with hair details prominent.
attribute_subject_matter: fragmented human head with flowing hair
attribute_location_context: No specific setting or environment is visible; the sculpture appears isolated against a plain background.
